name: junie-memory
description: A cross-session memory for Junie CLI, modeled on Claude Code's memory: an auto-loaded guideline that teaches the agent to recall facts at the start of a task and persist durable ones as files under ~/.junie/memory/, plus /remember and /memories slash commands. File-convention based — no server required. Ships scripts/recall-memory.sh, an optional UserPromptSubmit hook that injects the memory index into every prompt, so recall does not depend on the model remembering to read it.
